Rio The Video Game Rated UK Released

The Rio video game, based on the animated movie "Rio," was released in the UK with a rating of PEGI 3. The game was developed by the studio Thq and published by 20th Century Fox Games. It was made available for various platforms, including PlayStation 3, Xbox 360, Wii, Nintendo DS, and PC.
